subprograms.name: Address_Image
subprograms.code:
function Address_Image (Value  : in System.Address;
                        Format : in String := "") return String

subprograms.name: Close_File
subprograms.code: procedure Close_File (File : in out File_T)

subprograms.name: File_Mode
subprograms.code: function File_Mode   (File : in File_T) return File_Mode_T

subprograms.name: Integer_Image
subprograms.code:
function Integer_Image (Value  : in Integer;
                        Format : in String := "") return String

subprograms.name: Is_Readable
subprograms.code: function Is_Readable (File : in File_T) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Is_Writable
subprograms.code: function Is_Writable (File : in File_T) return Boolean

subprograms.name: Long_Float_Image
subprograms.code:
function Long_Float_Image (Value  : in Long_Float;
                           Format : in String := "") return String

subprograms.name: Long_Integer_Image
subprograms.code:
function Long_Integer_Image (Value  : in Long_Integer;
                             Format : in String := "") return String

subprograms.name: Long_Long_Float_Image
subprograms.code:
function Long_Long_Float_Image (Value  : in Long_Long_Float;
                                Format : in String := "") return String

subprograms.name: Open_File
Open_Null
subprograms.code: procedure Open_Null (File : in out File_T)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code:
procedure Put (File : in File_T;
               Item : in Character)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code:
procedure Put (File : in File_T;
               Item : in String)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: procedure Put (Item : in Character)

subprograms.name: Put
subprograms.code: procedure Put (Item : in String)

subprograms.name: Put_Line
subprograms.code:
procedure Put_Line (File : in File_T;
                    Item : in String)

subprograms.name: Put_Line
subprograms.code: procedure Put_Line (Item : in String)

subprograms.name: Standard_Error
subprograms.code: function Standard_Error  return File_T

subprograms.name: Standard_Input
subprograms.code: function Standard_Input  return File_T

subprograms.name: Standard_Output
subprograms.code: function Standard_Output return File_T
